headline: HSBC Maintains Hold on Progressive, Raises Price Target to $221
summary: HSBC  analyst Vikram Gandhi   maintains Progressive (NYSE:PGR) with a Hold and raises the price target from $214 to $221.

raw.headline: HSBC Maintains Hold on Progressive, Raises Price Target to $221

headline: Progressive Gears Up For Q2 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
summary: Progressive Corp. (PGE) to release Q2 earnings on July 15. Analysts expect $4.60/share, down from last year. Stock rose 3.1%. Analyst ratings available.
